title: Start Here
summary: Landing page for humans and LLMs.
Explains the public pages, source files, and internal claim markers.

title: Political context
summary: Sets the current political frame and replaces informal shorthand with cleaner wording.
Defines the dossier's three recurring layers: narrative control, the money layer, and demographic lock-in.

title: System logic: narrative inversion, dependency, and entrenchment
summary: Uses the agenda paper as the conceptual backbone, but keeps it proportionate.
Frames the broader pattern as a sequence rather than a pile of unrelated disputes.

title: Elite factions inside one shared system
summary: Keeps the dossier away from cartoon single-cabal framing.
Distinguishes the Davos-style bloc from the nationalist and resource-capital bloc.

title: Ownership and governance layers
summary: Explains the ownership layer without pretending it is day-to-day editorial control.
Keeps the distinction between equity concentration and direct newsroom command.

title: The compliance network beyond ownership
summary: Maps the regulation, NGO, advertiser, and platform stack beyond formal ownership.
Treats the network as a compliance regime rather than a single command center.

title: Manufactured outrage and narrative laundering
summary: Integrates the manufactured-outage paper as a narrative-control case study.
Shows how selective amplification and muted correction shape public memory.

title: Protected categories, compelled language, and race-explicit preferences
summary: Compresses the trans and white-discrimination receipts into one proportionate section.
Keeps the claim narrow: real institutional enforcement existed.

title: The money layer: NGOs, fraud exposure, and protest infrastructure
summary: Connects bureaucratic dependency to NGOs, contractors, and professional activism.
Uses the Nate Friedman source note proportionately, not as a total explanation.

title: Immigration, demographic clientelism, and Canada as case study
summary: Uses the Canada intake paper as the main concrete case study.
Connects demographic management to weak front-end controls and expanding intermediary layers.

title: Trade leverage, tariffs, and Canada's weak hand
summary: Integrates the Canada tariff paper without turning the whole dossier into a trade memo.
Keeps the point simple: Canada entered the conflict from a weaker position.

title: What the second-term Trump administration is actually hitting
summary: Converts the old informal Trump section into a more serious pressure-point map.
Focuses on concrete pillars rather than vibes.

title: Why accountability stays narrow and slow
summary: Removes the Bondi-Comey framing and states the constraint logic in general form.
Explains why exposure does not automatically become conviction.

title: Summary in one pass
summary: One-pass compression of the rebuilt dossier.
States the thesis without the informal language of the old version.
